note: Agent-readable metadata, companion to nb.tokens.json. The semantic (colour) tier and the typography tier (type composites + weight roles) carry the rich schema; the primitive tier a simplified set + colour-scale `intent` and `aliased_by` (the reverse index — which tokens resolve to it, TRANSITIVELY, so the two-hop weight chain composite→role→numeric is visible). `aliased_by` is recomputed from the token tree on every build (authoritative at build time, never hand-maintained — it cannot drift). All fields generated and contract-true.

background.primary.avoid_when: Do not use for text, icons, or interactive fills. For interactive elements use foreground.interactive.

background.secondary.avoid_when: Do not use for text, icons, or interactive fills. For interactive elements use foreground.interactive.

background.tertiary.avoid_when: Do not use for text, icons, or interactive fills. For interactive elements use foreground.interactive.

background.quaternary.when_to_use: Fill for floating UI (dialogs, popovers, menus).
background.quaternary.avoid_when: Do not use for text, icons, or interactive fills. For interactive elements use foreground.interactive.

background.subtle.when_to_use: Secondary background for grouped or low-emphasis regions.
background.subtle.avoid_when: Do not use as the primary page surface (use background.primary).

background.sunken.when_to_use: Wells, insets, tracks — areas that read as below the page.
background.sunken.avoid_when: Do not use for raised elements (use background.secondary+).

background.inverse.when_to_use: High-contrast inverted sections (e.g. a dark callout in light mode).
background.inverse.avoid_when: Do not place mode-default text on it — use text.inverse / text.on-emphasis.

background.brand-subtle.when_to_use: Low-emphasis brand backgrounds — badges, banners, selected rows.
background.brand-subtle.avoid_when: Do not use as a solid brand fill (use foreground.brand) or for brand text (use text.brand).

background.success-subtle.when_to_use: Low-emphasis success backgrounds — badges, banners, selected rows.
background.success-subtle.avoid_when: Do not use as a solid success fill (use foreground.success) or for success text (use text.success).

background.warning-subtle.when_to_use: Low-emphasis warning backgrounds — badges, banners, selected rows.
background.warning-subtle.avoid_when: Do not use as a solid warning fill (use foreground.warning) or for warning text (use text.warning).

background.danger-subtle.when_to_use: Low-emphasis danger backgrounds — badges, banners, selected rows.
background.danger-subtle.avoid_when: Do not use as a solid danger fill (use foreground.danger) or for danger text (use text.danger).

background.info-subtle.when_to_use: Low-emphasis info backgrounds — badges, banners, selected rows.
background.info-subtle.avoid_when: Do not use as a solid info fill (use foreground.info) or for info text (use text.info).

scrim.default.when_to_use: The dimming layer behind a modal, dialog, or drawer.
scrim.default.avoid_when: Do not use as a solid surface or for any opaque element.

foreground.primary.when_to_use: High-emphasis neutral elements — neutral/secondary buttons, strong chips.
foreground.primary.avoid_when: Do not use for text/icons (use text.*/icon.*) or page surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.secondary.when_to_use: Medium-emphasis neutral fills — subtle buttons, chips.
foreground.secondary.avoid_when: Do not use for text/icons (use text.*/icon.*) or page surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.tertiary.when_to_use: Low-emphasis neutral fills — ghost buttons, hover wells.
foreground.tertiary.avoid_when: Do not use for text/icons (use text.*/icon.*) or page surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.inverse.$description: Neutral element fill for inverse contexts.
foreground.inverse.when_to_use: Neutral fills placed on inverse surfaces.
foreground.inverse.avoid_when: Do not use on default surfaces (use foreground.primary).

foreground.brand.when_to_use: Filled brand elements — badges, banners, status chips.
foreground.brand.avoid_when: Do not use for brand text (use text.brand) or as a subtle tint (use background.brand-subtle).

foreground.success.when_to_use: Filled success elements — badges, banners, status chips.
foreground.success.avoid_when: Do not use for success text (use text.success) or as a subtle tint (use background.success-subtle).

foreground.warning.when_to_use: Filled warning elements — badges, banners, status chips.
foreground.warning.avoid_when: Do not use for warning text (use text.warning) or as a subtle tint (use background.warning-subtle).

foreground.info.when_to_use: Filled info elements — badges, banners, status chips.
foreground.info.avoid_when: Do not use for info text (use text.info) or as a subtle tint (use background.info-subtle).

foreground.interactive.default.when_to_use: Primary interactive surfaces — buttons, toggles, controls.
foreground.interactive.default.avoid_when: Do not use for destructive actions (use foreground.danger) or non-interactive surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.danger.default.when_to_use: Destructive actions — delete/remove buttons, error fills.
foreground.danger.default.avoid_when: Do not use for non-destructive actions (use foreground.interactive) or warnings (use foreground.warning).

foreground.interactive.hover.when_to_use: Primary interactive surfaces — buttons, toggles, controls on pointer hover.
foreground.interactive.hover.avoid_when: Do not use for destructive actions (use foreground.danger) or non-interactive surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.danger.hover.when_to_use: Destructive actions — delete/remove buttons, error fills on pointer hover.
foreground.danger.hover.avoid_when: Do not use for non-destructive actions (use foreground.interactive) or warnings (use foreground.warning).

foreground.interactive.pressed.when_to_use: Primary interactive surfaces — buttons, toggles, controls while pressed.
foreground.interactive.pressed.avoid_when: Do not use for destructive actions (use foreground.danger) or non-interactive surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.danger.pressed.when_to_use: Destructive actions — delete/remove buttons, error fills while pressed.
foreground.danger.pressed.avoid_when: Do not use for non-destructive actions (use foreground.interactive) or warnings (use foreground.warning).

foreground.interactive.focused.when_to_use: Primary interactive surfaces — buttons, toggles, controls when keyboard-focused.
foreground.interactive.focused.avoid_when: Do not use for destructive actions (use foreground.danger) or non-interactive surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.danger.focused.when_to_use: Destructive actions — delete/remove buttons, error fills when keyboard-focused.
foreground.danger.focused.avoid_when: Do not use for non-destructive actions (use foreground.interactive) or warnings (use foreground.warning).

foreground.interactive.selected.when_to_use: Primary interactive surfaces — buttons, toggles, controls when selected / active.
foreground.interactive.selected.avoid_when: Do not use for destructive actions (use foreground.danger) or non-interactive surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.danger.selected.when_to_use: Destructive actions — delete/remove buttons, error fills when selected / active.
foreground.danger.selected.avoid_when: Do not use for non-destructive actions (use foreground.interactive) or warnings (use foreground.warning).

foreground.interactive.disabled.when_to_use: Primary interactive surfaces — buttons, toggles, controls when disabled / unavailable.
foreground.interactive.disabled.avoid_when: Do not use for destructive actions (use foreground.danger) or non-interactive surfaces (use background.*).

foreground.danger.disabled.when_to_use: Destructive actions — delete/remove buttons, error fills when disabled / unavailable.
foreground.danger.disabled.avoid_when: Do not use for non-destructive actions (use foreground.interactive) or warnings (use foreground.warning).

text.on-interactive.avoid_when: Do not use on standard surfaces — use text.primary/secondary.

text.interactive.hover.when_to_use: Hyperlinks and interactive text on pointer hover.

type.display.sm.when_to_use: Large expressive headlines and hero moments.
type.display.sm.avoid_when: Do not use for product-UI headings (use title) or running text (use body).

type.display.md.avoid_when: Do not use for product-UI headings (use title) or running text (use body).

type.display.3xl.avoid_when: Do not use for product-UI headings (use title) or running text (use body).

type.title.xs.$description: Heading type — visual hierarchy, decoupled from DOM level.
type.title.xs.meaning: Type style — title xs (18px, display face)
type.title.xs.when_to_use: Section and page headings; pick the size for visual prominence and set the DOM level (h1–h6) by document structure independently.
type.title.xs.avoid_when: Do not bind the size to a heading level; do not use for running text (use body).

type.body.sm.meaning: Type style — body sm (14px, text face)
type.body.sm.when_to_use: Paragraphs, descriptions, and default interface text.
type.body.sm.avoid_when: Do not use for headings (use title/display) or dense control labels (use label).

type.body.md.meaning: Type style — body md (16px, text face)
type.body.md.when_to_use: Paragraphs, descriptions, and default interface text.
type.body.md.avoid_when: Do not use for headings (use title/display) or dense control labels (use label).

type.body.lg.when_to_use: Paragraphs, descriptions, and default interface text.
type.body.lg.avoid_when: Do not use for headings (use title/display) or dense control labels (use label).

type.label.sm.meaning: Type style — label sm (12px, display face)
type.label.sm.when_to_use: Control and form labels, button text, tabs, chips, badges.
type.label.sm.avoid_when: Do not use for running text (use body).

type.label.md.$description: UI label type — buttons, form labels, tabs, chips.

type.label.md.when_to_use: Control and form labels, button text, tabs, chips, badges.

type.code.inline.avoid_when: Do not use for prose (use body).

font.weight-role.subtle.meaning: Function-named weight → 300 — white-label-stable (the role is the contract; each brand maps the numeric).
font.weight-role.subtle.when_to_use: Reference font.weight-role.subtle (not the numeric) so a brand weight re-map reflows every consumer at once.
font.weight-role.subtle.avoid_when: Do not hard-code the numeric (300); reference the role.

font.weight-role.default.meaning: Function-named weight → 400 — white-label-stable (the role is the contract; each brand maps the numeric).
font.weight-role.default.when_to_use: Reference font.weight-role.default (not the numeric) so a brand weight re-map reflows every consumer at once.
font.weight-role.default.avoid_when: Do not hard-code the numeric (400); reference the role.

font.weight-role.emphasis.meaning: Function-named weight → 600 — white-label-stable (the role is the contract; each brand maps the numeric).
font.weight-role.emphasis.when_to_use: Reference font.weight-role.emphasis (not the numeric) so a brand weight re-map reflows every consumer at once.
font.weight-role.emphasis.avoid_when: Do not hard-code the numeric (600); reference the role.

font.weight-role.strong.meaning: Function-named weight → 700 — white-label-stable (the role is the contract; each brand maps the numeric).
font.weight-role.strong.when_to_use: Reference font.weight-role.strong (not the numeric) so a brand weight re-map reflows every consumer at once.
font.weight-role.strong.avoid_when: Do not hard-code the numeric (700); reference the role.
